params.js: (function(){var lis=document.querySelectorAll('#user-repositories-list ul li');var repos=[];lis.forEach(function(li){var a=li.querySelector('h3 a, a[itemprop*=\"name\"]');if(!a)return;var name=(a.textContent||'').trim();var href=a.getAttribute('href')||'';var desc=(li.querySelector('p[itemprop=description], p')||{}).textContent||'';var lang=(li.querySelector('[itemprop=programmingLanguage]')||{}).textContent||'';var rt=li.querySelector('relative-time');var time=rt?(rt.getAttribute('datetime')||''):'';repos.push({name:name,href:href,description:desc.trim().slice(0,140),language:lang.trim(),updated:time});});window.__repos=repos;return {totalCount:repos.length, repos:repos.slice(0,10)}})()

(function(){var rows=document.querySelectorAll('div[data-testid=commit-row-item]');var commits=[];rows.forEach(function(c){var msgA=c.querySelector('h4 a, a[data-testid*=commit-message]');var sha=(c.querySelector('a[href*=\"/commit/\"]')||{}).getAttribute&&(c.querySelector('a[href*=\"/commit/\"]')||{}).getAttribute('href')||'';var sm=sha.match(/\/commit\/([0-9a-f]+)/);var author=(c.querySelector('a[data-hovercard-type=user]')||{}).textContent||'';var rt=c.querySelector('relative-time');var time=rt?(rt.getAttribute('datetime')||''):'';commits.push({message:msgA?(msgA.textContent||'').trim().slice(0,160):'',sha:sm?sm[1].slice(0,7):'',author:author.trim(),time:time});});return {repoUrl:location.href.split('/commits')[0], title:document.title, commitCount:commits.length, commits:commits.slice(0,12)}})()
